reasoning: The LLM fidelity signal flags a major concern regarding the absence of critical visual content, specifically GIS maps on slides 12-15, 17, and 22-23, as well as a key photo on slide 11. While the text-based shingling recall is high (0.866), the low shingling precision (0.577) and the fidelity_composite score of 0.60 indicate significant structural or visual deficiencies. Since maps are essential to a GIS-themed presentation, their omission constitutes a substantial loss of informational value.

concerns.analysis: Several meaningful images from the source PDF are missing in the HTML conversion. Specifically, the majority of GIS-related maps and one key photo are absent. This includes the map images on slides 12, 13, 14, 15, 17, 22, and 23, which are central to the 'The Value of GIS' theme. Additionally, the photo of a school bus at a railroad crossing on slide 11 is missing.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains several critical images including: a photo of a bus at railroad tracks (page 11), a map of NCDOT railroad crossings (page 12), a bus run optimization map (page 13), bus stop consolidation maps (page 14), bus route maps (page 15), a school boundary planning map (page 17), a median income map (page 22), and a student growth heat map (page 23).
concerns.output_quote: The corresponding sections in the HTML output (e.g., 'Bus Routing Information', 'NCDOT Railroad Crossing Report', 'Bus Run Optimization', 'Case Study', 'School Boundary Planning', etc.) are missing these primary visual elements, showing only the text or associated tables.
concerns.location: Throughout the document, specifically pages 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 17, 22, and 23.

action_items: Verify the presence and accessibility of the GIS maps and photos mentioned in the fidelity report.
Determine if the low precision score is due to conversion noise or structural hallucination.
Ensure alt-text or descriptions are provided for the missing visual data if the images are restored.
